title: taraxacum morulum
intro: Taraxacum morulum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or small dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum morulum include supporting digestive health and reducing symptoms of urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum morulum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
